title: Companies (Registration Offices and Fees) fourth Amendment Rules, 2018
description: Companies (Registration Offices and Fees) fourth Amendment Rules, 2018
text: [To be published in the Gazette of lndia, Extraordinary, Part ll, Section 3, Sub-Section (i)] Government of India MINISTRY OF CORPOMTE AFFAIRS Notification New Delhi, dated 2lstAugust' 2018 G.S.R. ......[E)'-ln exercise of the powers conferred by sections 396'398'399' 403 and 404 read with sub-sections (1) and (i) of section 469 of the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013J, the Central Gov"rnment iereby mal<es the following rules further to amend the Companies (Registration Offices and Fees) Rules,2014, namely:- 1.(1)TheserulesmaybecalledtheCompanies(RegistrationofficesandFees)Fourth Amendment Rules, 2018. (2) They shall come into force from the date oftheir publication in the Official Gazette' 2. ln the Companies [Registration Offices and Fees) Rules, 20L4' in the Annexure' under the head VIl, ior note below Fee for filing e-form DIR-3 KYC, the following note shall be substituted, namelY:- "forthecurrentfinancial(201'8-201'9),nofeeshallbechargeabletill the 15th Seprember, zoia and fee of Rs.50oo shall be payable on or after rhe 16th Seotember,201B".
